name: Butter Corn Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a 9x13 inch baking pan.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. Stir in milk and corn. Mix until just combined.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface. Knead lightly.
5. Roll to about 1/2 inch in thickness.
6. Cut into 1-inch strips.
7. Lay each strip in the melted butter, turning to coat each side.
8. Bake in a 450°F oven for about 18 minutes or until crispy brown.
9. Serve immediately.
